name: TriggerPDU2
title: TriggerPDU2
syntax: long triggerPDU2(pdu PDUObject, dword DestBusContext, char[] DBName,char[] TXNode, char[] PDUName, dword ShortHeaderID, dword LongHeaderID, dword Flags, dword PayloadLen);
description: This function forwards a received PDU to another Network. The destination PDU can be changed. For gateway applications this function can be useful.

parameters.name: DestBusContext
parameters.description: bus context of the destination network where the pdu is to be sent

parameters.name: DBName
parameters.description: Name of the cluster in the database

parameters.name: TXNode
parameters.description: Name of the transmitter node, can be used with empty string also

parameters.name: PDUName
parameters.description: Name of the PDU to be transmitted.

parameters.name: ShortHeaderID
parameters.description: ID of the PDU to be transmitted. 0 means not configured

parameters.name: LongHeaderID
parameters.description: ID of the PDU to be transmitted. 0 means not configured

availability: CAN AUTOSAR PDUs Ethernet AUTOSAR PDUs FlexRay AUTOSAR PDUs
CAN AUTOSAR PDUs Ethernet AUTOSAR PDUs FlexRay AUTOSAR PDUs
